summary: Admin Console v3 testing completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified via Playwright. League selector with national at top, enriched matchday stats (partite/risultati/pronostici), state flow indicator (BOZZA→APERTA→BLOCCATA→LIVE→COMPLETATA), transition buttons, recalculate button for SUPER_ADMIN, role-based access (league owners see only owned leagues).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/v3/leagues - Super admin sees national league + all private leagues. League owner sees only owned leagues with role in ['owner', 'admin'].
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/v3/matchdays - Returns enriched data: match_count, results_count, predictions_user_count. Auto-lock check on OPEN matchdays past kickoff.

VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/transition - Validates state transitions (DRAFT→OPEN→LOCKED→LIVE→COMPLETED), prevents skipping/backwards, checks match count (1-10), validates results on COMPLETED.
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/recalculate - Only SUPER_ADMIN can recalculate, only on COMPLETED matchdays.

VERIFIED: Frontend Admin Console v3 - League selector shows national at top with NAZIONALE badge, matchday dropdown shows stats with status badges, state flow indicator with 5 states, transition buttons based on current state.
VERIFIED: Italian labels throughout - Console Admin, GIORNATE, PARTITE, STATO GIORNATA, BOZZA/APERTA/BLOCCATA/LIVE/COMPLETATA, Ricalcola Giornata, Segna come In Corso, etc.
VERIFIED: League owner (Ilio) sees 'GESTISCI LE MIE LEGHE' section on profile, can access admin console, sees only owned leagues (no NAZIONALE badge).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Console v3 fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/v3/leagues, GET /api/admin/v3/matchdays, POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/transition, POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/recalculate. Frontend at /admin. Key features: league selector with national at top, enriched matchday stats, state flow indicator, transition buttons, recalculate for SUPER_ADMIN on COMPLETED. Role-based: super admin sees all leagues + national; league owners see only owned leagues. All Italian labels verified.

backend: GET /api/admin/v3/leagues - role-based league listing (SUPER_ADMIN vs LEAGUE_OWNER)
GET /api/admin/v3/matchdays - enriched matchdays with match_count, results_count, predictions_user_count
POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/transition - state validation (no skip, no backward), match count validation (1-10), results validation for COMPLETED
frontend: Admin console loads with league selector showing national league at top
Matchday dropdown shows stats (partite, risultati, pronostici) with status badges
State flow indicator shows correct progress (dots and lines)
Transition button shows correct action based on current state
COMPLETED matchday shows 'Ricalcola Giornata' for SUPER_ADMIN only
League admin (owner of private league) can access admin console and see only owned leagues
All UI labels in Italian (Console Admin, GIORNATE, PARTITE, etc.)
